allowed_before_unblinding: operator safety stop documented before outcome inspection
corrupt JSONL line that fails schema validation
incomplete paired method panel detected by strict pairing audit
forbidden: dropping only the proposed method or only a weak baseline from a paired panel
dropping failures after viewing method identity or outcome
changing task families, methods, thresholds, or risk budget after collection starts
using local dry-run records, template configs, scaffold adapters, placeholder videos, or hand-entered metrics as evidence

primary_hypotheses.claim_supported_if_passed: The seam model improves external task success over the strongest non-oracle baseline.
The seam model improves external composition utility over the strongest non-oracle baseline.
The gain is visible across paired resets rather than only in aggregate means.
The fixed-risk gate preserves enough usable coverage to be operationally meaningful.
Accepted seams remain below the predeclared realized-breach budget.
The external improvement is not confined to one task family.

purpose: Pre-register external validation hypotheses, metrics, thresholds, exclusions, and reporting before any independent rollouts are collected.
required_reporting: 95% confidence intervals for primary external metrics
all exclusions with reasons and timestamps
oracle gap as post hoc upper bound
secondary_descriptive_outputs: representative success, repair, abstain, and failure videos

statistical_confidence_gate.rule: For external_success_margin, external_utility_margin, paired_win_rate, and fixed_risk_coverage, the 95% bootstrap lower confidence bound must meet or exceed the predeclared threshold. For fixed_risk_breach, the 95% bootstrap upper confidence bound must be at or below the threshold. Positive task-family coverage remains a predeclared count gate.

strongest_external_baseline_rule: Among non-oracle methods present in the external logs, choose the baseline with highest mean success, breaking ties by mean utility.

unblinding_policy.analysis_after_unblinding: run only the predeclared scripts and thresholds above; secondary plots are descriptive unless added to a new preregistered plan before collection.
method_aliases_remain_sealed_until: task configs are materialized and hash-locked
run id is specific and immutable
